name: 4G Activation
description: Enables 4G/LTE transmission on the aircraft via the DJI Cellular Dongle 2. 128 frames with the aircraft serial number embedded in each payload. Sent in a single round with 10ms between frames. On smart controllers these frames go via Unix domain socket (/duss/mb/0x205); on phone+USB setups they go via the bulk endpoint with dst=OFDM_GROUND (238).
source: Captured from loopback capture on a DJI smart controller for wa341 (Mavic 4 Pro). The frame format is documented in the DUMPL protocol — cmd_set=81 (0x51, 4G), cmd_id=0..127 (one per frame), dst=238 (OFDM_GROUND idx 7). NOTE: Mini 3 non-pro and Mini series do NOT support 4G — 4G is not supported on Mini series. 4G is enterprise-only (Mavic 4 Pro, Matrice series).
note: Each frame's payload is: 3 zero bytes + ASCII aircraft serial. Frame i has cmd_id=i (0..127). The serial is read from the controller at runtime via probeSerial(). Requires DJI Cellular Dongle 2 physically connected to the aircraft.
